name: osint-ru
description: Web app for searching Russian public government registries

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:go
scripts.build:frontend: echo 'Static assets are embedded — no frontend build step needed'
scripts.build:linux: GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o osint-ru-linux-amd64 main.go
scripts.build:windows: GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o osint-ru.exe main.go
scripts.build:mac: GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o osint-ru-mac-arm64 main.go
scripts.build:all: npm run build:linux && npm run build:windows && npm run build:mac
